transcript: Elephant tonsils... this is a joke, right? You know what a "BOHICA" is, right?
I'm the only one here, there's me and a clean-up guy.
I... I don't believe you, frankly.
Well, w... I'll tell you what... what do you want to do?
[sigh] I need to know where to put your tonsils, first and--
You're gonna pay for your tonsils...
Do you know where we're located?
That's not my job, sir. My job is to get your tonsils to you. I'm gonna be taking 'em right back out of ya. To be frank.
This is some kind of fuckin' joke! If you wanna take 'em out, you come over here and see me. I'm the only one here.
